name: Polenta Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the polenta according to package instructions, stirring frequently.
2. In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add red pepper, green pepper, yellow pepper, and onion. Sauté until vegetables are tender.
3. Pour the cooked polenta into a greased 9-inch square baking dish or Pyrex pan. Spread evenly.
4. Stir in spaghetti sauce and sprinkle with mozzarella cheese. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
6. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before slicing and serving. Enjoy!
